# Preface {#preface .unnumbered}

This project initially aimed to serve as the author's personal resource of automatically updated financial data for guiding unbiased and premeditated investing decision. As the project went along, it has gradually progressed into a more public reference for the author's close friends who are interested in investing and seek a financial data resource which is not [exhausting](https://www.sec.gov/ix?doc=/Archives/edgar/data/320193/000032019320000096/aapl-20200926.htm) but tidy and easy-to-get. All data presented on this project site are updated at least once a day. The last update date and time is `r paste(Sys.time(), 'KST')`. This project has been hugely inspired by [Warren Buffett](https://www.berkshirehathaway.com/letters/letters.html), @town2018, @graham2003, and @lee2020. This is a publicly accessible project still in its infant stage, and the author is always open to suggestions from whoever hopes to make it better. Always feel free to [contact](#author), or even better make a [pull request](https://docs.github.com/en/github/collaborating-with-issues-and-pull-requests/about-pull-requests)!\
\

![](images/CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0.png){width=120px}

This project is licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).
